signals.quote: It is a common thing for the small game in pre-release phase. We add something that is not compatible with the previous game version, so your previous game save would just crash. I know it is still frustrating, but it is the development process.

I understand your sadness, I feel the same way, but at the latest in the full version, the game scores will be saved even after updates. Unfortunately, this is the case with many demo games, so they are not saved.
Okay. Don't see why everyone is so upset. Like I said before, MOST demos don't have a save. So this is a PLUS. Besides, new code over old code isn't always the best way to do things.
yeah i understand, i may have uninstalled the game out of anger of losing my saved solo but i might come back again someday.. i really vibe with this game so i dont wanna abandon it
no im not talking about saved, i cannot go in a solo game, it starts to load (the painting) then my screen gets white and it tells me the game is not responding :)
